description: Start streaming BIND messages. Prepends a uint64 time resolution to the GET_BIND selective-request layout. When the request portion has body_size 0 (after the resolution field), all available children are streamed.

fields.name: resolution
fields.description: Minimum time between consecutive BIND messages, encoded in the OpenIGTLink timestamp format (upper 32 bits = seconds, lower 32 bits = fraction). 0 means 'as fast as possible'.

fields.name: ncmessages
fields.description: Number of child message types being requested. When the body after the resolution field is empty (body_size=8), this and all following fields are absent, meaning 'stream all available children'.

fields.name: type_ids
fields.description: Array of N × 12-byte type_id strings identifying which child types to include.

fields.name: nametable_size
fields.description: Byte length of the name table. MUST be even.

fields.name: name_table
fields.description: Packed device names — ncmessages null-terminated ASCII strings, 2-byte-aligned.
